speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: When shall I come to th’ top of that same hill?

speaker: EDGAR
text: You do climb up it now. Look how we labor.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Methinks the ground is even.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Horrible steep.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Hark, do you hear the sea?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: No, truly.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Why then, your other senses grow imperfect

speaker: EDGAR
text: By your eyes’ anguish.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: So may it be indeed.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Methinks thy voice is altered and thou speak’st

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: In better phrase and matter than thou didst.

speaker: EDGAR
text: You’re much deceived; in nothing am I changed

speaker: EDGAR
text: But in my garments.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Methinks you’re better spoken.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Come on, sir. Here’s the place. Stand still. How fearful

speaker: EDGAR
text: And dizzy ’tis to cast one’s eyes so low!

speaker: EDGAR
text: The crows and choughs that wing the midway air

speaker: EDGAR
text: Show scarce so gross as beetles. Halfway down

speaker: EDGAR
text: Hangs one that gathers samphire—dreadful trade;

speaker: EDGAR
text: Methinks he seems no bigger than his head.

speaker: EDGAR
text: The fishermen that walk upon the beach

speaker: EDGAR
text: Appear like mice, and yond tall anchoring bark

speaker: EDGAR
text: Diminished to her cock, her cock a buoy

speaker: EDGAR
text: Almost too small for sight. The murmuring surge

speaker: EDGAR
text: That on th’ unnumbered idle pebble chafes

speaker: EDGAR
text: Cannot be heard so high. I’ll look no more

speaker: EDGAR
text: Lest my brain turn and the deficient sight

speaker: EDGAR
text: Topple down headlong.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Set me where you stand.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Give me your hand. You are now within a foot

speaker: EDGAR
text: Of th’ extreme verge. For all beneath the moon

speaker: EDGAR
text: Would I not leap upright.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Let go my hand.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Here, friend, ’s another purse; in it a jewel

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Well worth a poor man’s taking. Fairies and gods

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Prosper it with thee.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Go thou further off.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Bid me farewell, and let me hear thee going.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Now fare you well, good sir.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: With all my heart.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Why I do trifle thus with his despair

speaker: EDGAR
text: Is done to cure it.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: O you mighty gods!

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: This world I do renounce, and in your sights

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Shake patiently my great affliction off.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: If I could bear it longer, and not fall

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: To quarrel with your great opposeless wills,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: My snuff and loathèd part of nature should

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Burn itself out. If Edgar live, O, bless him!—

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Now, fellow, fare thee well.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Gone, sir. Farewell.—

speaker: EDGAR
text: And yet I know not how conceit may rob

speaker: EDGAR
text: The treasury of life, when life itself

speaker: EDGAR
text: Yields to the theft. Had he been where he thought,

speaker: EDGAR
text: By this had thought been past. Alive or dead?—

speaker: EDGAR
text: Ho you, sir! Friend, hear you. Sir, speak.—

speaker: EDGAR
text: Thus might he pass indeed. Yet he revives.—

speaker: EDGAR
text: What are you, sir?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Away, and let me die.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Hadst thou been aught but gossamer, feathers, air,

speaker: EDGAR
text: So many fathom down precipitating,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Thou ’dst shivered like an egg; but thou dost breathe,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Hast heavy substance, bleed’st not, speak’st, art sound.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Ten masts at each make not the altitude

speaker: EDGAR
text: Which thou hast perpendicularly fell.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Thy life’s a miracle. Speak yet again.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: But have I fall’n or no?

speaker: EDGAR
text: From the dread summit of this chalky bourn.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Look up a-height. The shrill-gorged lark so far

speaker: EDGAR
text: Cannot be seen or heard. Do but look up.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Alack, I have no eyes.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Is wretchedness deprived that benefit

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: To end itself by death? ’Twas yet some comfort

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: When misery could beguile the tyrant’s rage

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: And frustrate his proud will.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Give me your arm.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Up. So, how is ’t? Feel you your legs? You stand.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Too well, too well.

speaker: EDGAR
text: This is above all strangeness.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Upon the crown o’ th’ cliff, what thing was that

speaker: EDGAR
text: Which parted from you?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: A poor unfortunate beggar.

speaker: EDGAR
text: As I stood here below, methought his eyes

speaker: EDGAR
text: Were two full moons; he had a thousand noses,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Horns whelked and waved like the enragèd sea.

speaker: EDGAR
text: It was some fiend. Therefore, thou happy father,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Think that the clearest gods, who make them honors

speaker: EDGAR
text: Of men’s impossibilities, have preserved thee.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I do remember now. Henceforth I’ll bear

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Affliction till it do cry out itself

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: “Enough, enough!” and die. That thing you speak of,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I took it for a man. Often ’twould say

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: “The fiend, the fiend!” He led me to that place.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Bear free and patient thoughts.

speaker: EDGAR
text: But who comes here?

speaker: EDGAR
text: The safer sense will ne’er accommodate

speaker: EDGAR
text: His master thus.

speaker: LEAR
text: No, they cannot touch me for coining. I am the

speaker: LEAR
text: King himself.

speaker: EDGAR
text: O, thou side-piercing sight!

speaker: LEAR
text: Nature’s above art in that respect. There’s your

speaker: LEAR
text: press-money. That fellow handles his bow like a

speaker: LEAR
text: crowkeeper. Draw me a clothier’s yard. Look, look,

speaker: LEAR
text: a mouse! Peace, peace! This piece of toasted cheese

speaker: LEAR
text: will do ’t. There’s my gauntlet; I’ll prove it on a

speaker: LEAR
text: giant. Bring up the brown bills. O, well flown, bird!

speaker: LEAR
text: I’ th’ clout, i’ th’ clout! Hewgh! Give the word.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Sweet marjoram.

speaker: LEAR
text: Pass.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I know that voice.

speaker: LEAR
text: Ha! Goneril with a white beard? They flattered

speaker: LEAR
text: me like a dog and told me I had the white hairs in

speaker: LEAR
text: my beard ere the black ones were there. To say “ay”

speaker: LEAR
text: and “no” to everything that I said “ay” and “no” to

speaker: LEAR
text: was no good divinity. When the rain came to wet me

speaker: LEAR
text: once and the wind to make me chatter, when the

speaker: LEAR
text: thunder would not peace at my bidding, there I

speaker: LEAR
text: found ’em, there I smelt ’em out. Go to. They are

speaker: LEAR
text: not men o’ their words; they told me I was everything.

speaker: LEAR
text: ’Tis a lie. I am not ague-proof.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: The trick of that voice I do well remember.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Is ’t not the King?

speaker: LEAR
text: Ay, every inch a king.

speaker: LEAR
text: When I do stare, see how the subject quakes.

speaker: LEAR
text: I pardon that man’s life. What was thy cause?

speaker: LEAR
text: Adultery? Thou shalt not die. Die for adultery? No.

speaker: LEAR
text: The wren goes to ’t, and the small gilded fly does

speaker: LEAR
text: lecher in my sight. Let copulation thrive, for

speaker: LEAR
text: Gloucester’s bastard son was kinder to his father

speaker: LEAR
text: than my daughters got ’tween the lawful sheets. To

speaker: LEAR
text: ’t, luxury, pell-mell, for I lack soldiers. Behold yond

speaker: LEAR
text: simp’ring dame, whose face between her forks

speaker: LEAR
text: presages snow, that minces virtue and does shake

speaker: LEAR
text: the head to hear of pleasure’s name. The fitchew

speaker: LEAR
text: nor the soiled horse goes to ’t with a more riotous

speaker: LEAR
text: appetite. Down from the waist they are centaurs,

speaker: LEAR
text: though women all above. But to the girdle do the

speaker: LEAR
text: gods inherit; beneath is all the fiend’s. There’s hell,

speaker: LEAR
text: there’s darkness, there is the sulphurous pit; burning,

speaker: LEAR
text: scalding, stench, consumption! Fie, fie, fie, pah,

speaker: LEAR
text: pah! Give me an ounce of civet, good apothecary;

speaker: LEAR
text: sweeten my imagination. There’s money for thee.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: O, let me kiss that hand!

speaker: LEAR
text: Let me wipe it first; it smells of mortality.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: O ruined piece of nature! This great world

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Shall so wear out to naught. Dost thou know me?

speaker: LEAR
text: I remember thine eyes well enough. Dost thou

speaker: LEAR
text: squinny at me? No, do thy worst, blind Cupid, I’ll

speaker: LEAR
text: not love. Read thou this challenge. Mark but the

speaker: LEAR
text: penning of it.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Were all thy letters suns, I could not see.

speaker: EDGAR
text: I would not take this from report. It is,

speaker: EDGAR
text: And my heart breaks at it.

speaker: LEAR
text: Read.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: What, with the case of eyes?

speaker: LEAR
text: O ho, are you there with me? No eyes in your

speaker: LEAR
text: head, nor no money in your purse? Your eyes are in

speaker: LEAR
text: a heavy case, your purse in a light, yet you see how

speaker: LEAR
text: this world goes.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: I see it feelingly.

speaker: LEAR
text: What, art mad? A man may see how this world

speaker: LEAR
text: goes with no eyes. Look with thine ears. See how

speaker: LEAR
text: yond justice rails upon yond simple thief. Hark in

speaker: LEAR
text: thine ear. Change places and, handy-dandy, which

speaker: LEAR
text: is the justice, which is the thief? Thou hast seen a

speaker: LEAR
text: farmer’s dog bark at a beggar?

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Ay, sir.

speaker: LEAR
text: And the creature run from the cur? There thou

speaker: LEAR
text: might’st behold the great image of authority: a

speaker: LEAR
text: dog’s obeyed in office.

speaker: LEAR
text: Thou rascal beadle, hold thy bloody hand!

speaker: LEAR
text: Why dost thou lash that whore? Strip thy own back.

speaker: LEAR
text: Thou hotly lusts to use her in that kind

speaker: LEAR
text: For which thou whipp’st her. The usurer hangs the cozener.

speaker: LEAR
text: Through tattered clothes small vices do appear.

speaker: LEAR
text: Robes and furred gowns hide all. Plate sin with gold,

speaker: LEAR
text: And the strong lance of justice hurtless breaks.

speaker: LEAR
text: Arm it in rags, a pygmy’s straw does pierce it.

speaker: LEAR
text: None does offend, none, I say, none; I’ll able ’em.

speaker: LEAR
text: Take that of me, my friend, who have the power

speaker: LEAR
text: To seal th’ accuser’s lips. Get thee glass eyes,

speaker: LEAR
text: And like a scurvy politician

speaker: LEAR
text: Seem to see the things thou dost not. Now, now, now, now.

speaker: LEAR
text: Pull off my boots. Harder, harder. So.

speaker: EDGAR
text: O, matter and impertinency mixed,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Reason in madness!

speaker: LEAR
text: If thou wilt weep my fortunes, take my eyes.

speaker: LEAR
text: I know thee well enough; thy name is Gloucester.

speaker: LEAR
text: Thou must be patient. We came crying hither;

speaker: LEAR
text: Thou know’st the first time that we smell the air

speaker: LEAR
text: We wawl and cry. I will preach to thee. Mark.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Alack, alack the day!

speaker: LEAR
text: When we are born, we cry that we are come

speaker: LEAR
text: To this great stage of fools.—This’ a good block.

speaker: LEAR
text: It were a delicate stratagem to shoe

speaker: LEAR
text: A troop of horse with felt. I’ll put ’t in proof,

speaker: LEAR
text: And when I have stol’n upon these son-in-laws,

speaker: LEAR
text: Then kill, kill, kill, kill, kill, kill!

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text:
O, here he is.

                an

              Lay hand upon him.—Sir,

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Your most dear daughter—

speaker: LEAR
text: No rescue? What, a prisoner? I am even

speaker: LEAR
text: The natural fool of Fortune. Use me well.

speaker: LEAR
text: You shall have ransom. Let me have surgeons;

speaker: LEAR
text: I am cut to th’ brains.

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: You shall have anything.

speaker: LEAR
text: No seconds? All myself?

speaker: LEAR
text: Why, this would make a man a man of salt,

speaker: LEAR
text: To use his eyes for garden waterpots,

speaker: LEAR
text: Ay, and laying autumn’s dust.

speaker: LEAR
text: I will die bravely like a smug bridegroom. What?

speaker: LEAR
text: I will be jovial. Come, come, I am a king,

speaker: LEAR
text: Masters, know you that?

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: You are a royal one, and we obey you.

speaker: LEAR
text: Then there’s life in ’t. Come, an you get it, you

speaker: LEAR
text: shall get it by running. Sa, sa, sa, sa.

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: A sight most pitiful in the meanest wretch,

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Past speaking of in a king. Thou hast a daughter

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Who redeems nature from the general curse

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Which twain have brought her to.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Hail, gentle sir.

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Sir, speed you. What’s your will?

speaker: EDGAR
text: Do you hear aught, sir, of a battle toward?

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Most sure and vulgar. Everyone hears that,

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Which can distinguish sound.

speaker: EDGAR
text: But, by your favor,

speaker: EDGAR
text: How near’s the other army?

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Near and on speedy foot. The main descry

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Stands on the hourly thought.

speaker: EDGAR
text: I thank you, sir. That’s all.

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Though that the Queen on special cause is here,

speaker: GENTLEMAN
text: Her army is moved on.

speaker: EDGAR
text: I thank you, sir.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: You ever-gentle gods, take my breath from me;

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Let not my worser spirit tempt me again

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: To die before you please.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Well pray you, father.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Now, good sir, what are you?

speaker: EDGAR
text: A most poor man, made tame to Fortune’s blows,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Who, by the art of known and feeling sorrows,

speaker: EDGAR
text: Am pregnant to good pity. Give me your hand;

speaker: EDGAR
text: I’ll lead you to some biding.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Hearty thanks.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: The bounty and the benison of heaven

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: To boot, and boot.

speaker: OSWALD
text: A proclaimed prize! Most happy!

speaker: OSWALD
text: That eyeless head of thine was first framed flesh

speaker: OSWALD
text: To raise my fortunes. Thou old unhappy traitor,

speaker: OSWALD
text: Briefly thyself remember; the sword is out

speaker: OSWALD
text: That must destroy thee.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Now let thy friendly hand

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Put strength enough to ’t.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Wherefore, bold peasant,

speaker: OSWALD
text: Dar’st thou support a published traitor? Hence,

speaker: OSWALD
text: Lest that th’ infection of his fortune take

speaker: OSWALD
text: Like hold on thee. Let go his arm.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Chill not let go, zir, without vurther ’casion.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Let go, slave, or thou diest!

speaker: EDGAR
text: Good gentleman, go your gait, and let poor

speaker: EDGAR
text: volk pass. An ’chud ha’ bin zwaggered out of my

speaker: EDGAR
text: life, ’twould not ha’ bin zo long as ’tis by a vortnight.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Nay, come not near th’ old man. Keep out,

speaker: EDGAR
text: che vor’ ye, or Ise try whether your costard or my

speaker: EDGAR
text: ballow be the harder. Chill be plain with you.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Out, dunghill.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Chill pick your teeth, zir. Come, no matter vor

speaker: EDGAR
text: your foins.

speaker: OSWALD
text: Slave, thou hast slain me. Villain, take my purse.

speaker: OSWALD
text: If ever thou wilt thrive, bury my body,

speaker: OSWALD
text: And give the letters which thou find’st about me

speaker: OSWALD
text: To Edmund, Earl of Gloucester. Seek him out

speaker: OSWALD
text: Upon the English party. O, untimely death! Death!

speaker: EDGAR
text: I know thee well, a serviceable villain,

speaker: EDGAR
text: As duteous to the vices of thy mistress

speaker: EDGAR
text: As badness would desire.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: What, is he dead?

speaker: EDGAR
text: Sit you down, father; rest you.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Let’s see these pockets. The letters that he speaks of

speaker: EDGAR
text: May be my friends. He’s dead; I am only sorry

speaker: EDGAR
text: He had no other deathsman. Let us see.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Leave, gentle wax, and, manners, blame us not.

speaker: EDGAR
text: To know our enemies’ minds, we rip their hearts.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Their papers is more lawful.

speaker: EDGAR
text: O indistinguished space of woman’s will!

speaker: EDGAR
text: A plot upon her virtuous husband’s life,

speaker: EDGAR
text: And the exchange my brother.—Here, in the sands

speaker: EDGAR
text: Thee I’ll rake up, the post unsanctified

speaker: EDGAR
text: Of murderous lechers; and in the mature time

speaker: EDGAR
text: With this ungracious paper strike the sight

speaker: EDGAR
text: Of the death-practiced duke. For him ’tis well

speaker: EDGAR
text: That of thy death and business I can tell.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: The King is mad. How stiff is my vile sense

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: That I stand up and have ingenious feeling

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: Of my huge sorrows! Better I were distract.

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: So should my thoughts be severed from my griefs,

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: And woes, by wrong imaginations, lose

speaker: GLOUCESTER
text: The knowledge of themselves.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Give me your hand.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Far off methinks I hear the beaten drum.

speaker: EDGAR
text: Come, father, I’ll bestow you with a friend.
